pendingApplications.address: Bridge Works 2 Bridgewater Embankment Altrincham WA14 4RL
pendingApplications.proposal: Application under Section 19 of the Town and Country Planning (Listed Buildings and Conservation Areas Act 1990) for variation of condition 4 on planning permission 116886/VAR/25 (Application under Section 19 of the Town and Country Planning (Listed Buildings and Conservation Areas Act 1990) for variation of condition 4 on planning permission 115864/VAR/25 (Application under Section 19 of the Planning (Listed Building and Conservation Areas) Act 1990 for variation of conditions 3 and 4 on Listed Building Consent 111564/LBC/23 (Listed Building Consent for the conversion of Grade II listed former canal warehouse building to form 32 apartments including roof extension, partial demolition, repair and alteration). To amend the wording of conditions 3 and 4 to vary timescales (Condition 3 Submission of stabilisation information within nine months and Condition 4 Implementation and completion of stabilisation works within twelve months). To amend Condition 4 to vary the timescales for implementation of urgent works to within 18 months of the date of the original permission (29 August 2024).). To amend Condition 4 to vary the timescales for implementation of urgent works to within 25 months of the date of the original permission (29 August 2024).
